slots.caption_ig:
Found it. Now get it. Order, reserve, or pick up — without leaving the app. DoorDash, Uber Eats, Resy, call & pickup, all in one tap. Free iOS beta.

#ForkFox #FoodApp #FoodOrder #DishNotRestaurant #BayAreaEats
slots.caption_fb: Once you know what you want, the rest should be one tap. ForkFox hands off to DoorDash, Uber Eats, Resy, or call-and-pickup — without ever leaving the app. We've finished the discovery; you just say where to send it.
slots.video_gen_prompt: Vertical 9:16 video, 7 seconds. iPhone screen recording. Dish detail page. Hand taps 'Order This Dish'. Sheet slides up with DoorDash + Uber Eats + Resy. Tap DoorDash. Confirmation. End frame: 'Found it. Now get it.' with 'get' in red.
